Learn Bachata in Zurich from international teachers Bachata Classes in Zurich AX cent Dance DISCOVER YOUR STYLE Looking for a new hobby in Zurich? Discover Bachata and join a welcoming community in Zurich Altstetten where you can meet new people and learn to dance. No partner needed — just bring your smile! BOOK FREE TRIAL VIEW SCHEDULE 🌍 Taught in 15+ Countries 🎓 50+ International Workshops 💃 Hundreds of Students Worldwide New to Dancing? Start here! We've created these guides just for you. START HERE ✨ Beginner Guide New to dance? Here is everything you need to know about your first class, what to wear, and more. READ GUIDE → NEWCOMER FRIENDLY 👋 What is Social Dancing? Discover a world where you can dance with anyone, anywhere. It's not about memorizing routines; it's about connection and fun. READ GUIDE → THE BASICS 🇩🇴 What is Bachata? Originating from the Dominican Republic, this rhythm has taken the world by storm. Learn about its roots and why it's so addictive. Join a welcoming Bachata dance class in Zurich where you can meet new people, make friends, and grow together. 02 Curriculum + Start with Bachata, then advance to Sensual. Learn the rules Master the rules Break the rules 03 Inspiration + Take part in exciting regular intensives and workshops with international guest instructors. We frequently host world-class artists to bring the best of dancing directly to Zurich. 04 Exploration + We travel regularly to international congresses to explore new styles, build community, and create memories. First Name Last Name Whatsapp Number Email Select a Class to Try Tuesday 18:30 BACHATA BEGINNER 0 FULL 19:30 Bachata Beginner 1 Wednesday 18:30 Spacer 19:30 Bachata Sensual Foundation 20:30 Bachata Sensual Improver Thursday 18:30 Spacer 19:30 Lady Styling 20:30 Bachata Sensual Int/Adv I agree to the Terms and Conditions I have read the Privacy Policy CONFIRM BOOKING Common Questions Do I need a partner? + No, you do not need a partner! Most of our students join solo. We rotate partners during class, which is the best way to learn quickly and meet people in our Zurich community. Are classes taught in English? + Yes, AXcent Dance is an English-speaking dance school in Zurich . Our international teachers lead all classes in English, making it perfect for expats and locals alike. Is it too late to start dancing as an adult? + It is never too late! Our Adult Beginner Classes are specifically designed for those who think they have "two left feet." We break everything down step-by-step in a relaxed, fun environment. Can I join a class anytime? + Yes! Our classes run continuously, so you can join our drop-in dance classes in Zurich anytime. No need to wait for a new semester to start—just book a free trial . # Page: Bachata Schedule Zurich | Weekly Dance Class Times | AXcent (schedule.html)
Description: Check this week's Bachata class schedule in Zurich Altstetten. 5 levels, Mon–Thu evenings. No partner needed. Find the perfect class for your level.

Bachata Schedule Zurich | Weekly Dance Class Times | AXcent AXCENT DANCE Home About us Schedule Registration Events Contact More ▾ Room Rental Corporate Events Wedding Dance Private Lessons Gallery Education Beginner Guide Blog FAQ Dance Etiquette Book Free Trial EN | DE WEEKLY CLASSES BACHATA CLASSES SCHEDULE Find your rhythm with our weekly Bachata classes in Zurich Altstetten. From absolute beginners to advanced dancers, we have a spot for you. BOOK TRIAL CLASS Weekly Schedule Zurich Altstetten • English Taught Start Tuesday Wednesday Thursday 18:30 Full Bachata Bachata Beginner 0 with Ale y Alexia 19:30 Bachata Bachata Beginner 1 with Ale y Alexia Sensual Style Bachata Sensual Foundation with Ale y Xidan Styling Open Level Lady Style with Xidan 20:30 Sensual Style Bachata Sensual Improver with Ale y Xidan Sensual Style Bachata Sensual Intermediate/Advanced with Ale y Xidan * Instructor approval required Tuesday Full 18:30 Bachata Beginner 0 19:30 Bachata Beginner 1 Wednesday 19:30 Bachata Sensual Foundation (Sensual Style) 20:30 Bachata Sensual Improver (Sensual Style) Thursday 19:30 Open Level Lady Style (Styling) 20:30 Bachata Sensual Intermediate/Advanced (Sensual Style) * Instructor approval required Your Dance Journey This is an overview of a dancer's journey with AXcent. We divide classes by what you should be taking (Core) and what would be a good complimentary addition. Remember that each journey belongs to you. Please talk to us to know what is the best class for you! The Start Your friendly introduction to Bachata. Everyone Bachata Beginner 0 (First Month) Bachata Beginner 1 Building the Style Foundation 🕺 Leader Core: Sensual Foundation 💃 Follow Core: Sensual Foundation Complimentary: Lady Styling Expanding Your Flow 🕺 Leader Core: Sensual Foundation Core: Improver 💃 Follow Core: Improver Core: Lady Styling Complimentary: Sensual Foundation Refining the Connection 🕺 Leader Core: Sensual Intermediate Core: Improver 💃 Follow Core: Sensual Intermediate Core: Lady Styling Mastering the Art 🕺 Leader Sensual Advanced 💃 Follow Sensual Advanced Lady Styling Private Classes Want more flexibility ? Ready to really focus on your learning ? Private lessons provide the perfect environment to accelerate your growth. EXPLORE PRIVATE LESSONS Frequently Asked Questions Do I need to start at the beginning of the month? + No! Our classes run continuously, so you can join anytime if you have previous experience. New beginners are encouraged to start at the beginning of a cycle or book a private intro session. What if I don't have a partner? + No problem at all! We rotate partners during class, so everyone dances with everyone. It's the best way to learn! If you prefer to stay with your own partner, just let the teacher know. How do I know my level? + Check our Beginner Guide or ask our instructors during a trial class. We are happy to assess your level and recommend the best class for you. What if I miss a class? + We understand that life can get busy! If you miss a class, don't worry—you won't fall behind. We allow you to catch up by attending a similar level class on a different day within the same course period. Plus, if you know your dates in advance, you can let us know during registration, and we'll prorate the cost for pre-planned absences. Our goal is to make sure you get the most out of your dance journey with flexibility and support. AXCENT DANCE Hermetschloostrasse 73, 8048 Zurich Altstetten 2 minute walking from Tram 2 stop and Bus 31 stop Quick Links What is Bachata Roots of Bachata Schedule Our Blog Legal Terms & Conditions Privacy Policy Imprint Find Us © 2025 AXcent Dance. All rights reserved.

If there are days you cannot join (up to 2), write them here so that we can extend your pass. (Not applicable for 10 Pass Package) I want to stay connected with AXcent Dance news and events. I accept the Privacy Policy. I accept the General Terms and Conditions. COMPLETE REGISTRATION Frequently Asked Questions What payment methods do you accept? + We accept Twint , Cash , and Bank Transfer . Payment details will be sent to you via email or WhatsApp after you complete your registration. What if I miss a class? Can I catch up? + No worries! Life happens. You can make up one missed class due to sickness within your 8-week period by attending another class of your level (or lower). However, please note that if you have already declared two planned absences (e.g. for holidays) for a pro-rated price, a third makeup day is not possible. Please let us know in advance so we can check availability. Is the registration binding? + Yes, registration secures your spot in the course, which is often limited to ensure quality. This helps us to maintain balanced classes with an equal number of leaders and followers. Please review our General Terms and Conditions regarding cancellations. Do you offer trial classes? + Yes! For our beginner courses, we often offer free trial classes before the cycle starts. You can also book a specific trial session via the form on our Home Page . # Page: Meet the Team | AXcent Dance Team & Philosophy Zurich (about.html)
Description: Meet the best dance teachers in Zurich at AXcent Dance. Learn about our philosophy, our instructors, and our passion for Latin dance.

Meet the Team | AXcent Dance Team & Philosophy Zurich AXCENT DANCE Home About us Schedule Registration Events Contact More ▾ Room Rental Corporate Events Wedding Dance Private Lessons Gallery Education Beginner Guide Blog FAQ Dance Etiquette Book Free Trial EN | DE AXcent Team Meet the Minds Behind AXcent Dance Zurich Passion, Technique, and Community. Our Mission We are honored to have been invited to teach and share our passion with dance communities across the globe. 25+ Cities 12 Countries 400+ International Dancers Reached ∞ Memories THE FOUNDERS Ale y Xidan We are Alessandro and Xidan, the founders of AXcent Dance. Our journey began with a shared passion for Bachata Sensual and a vision to create a dance school that goes beyond just teaching steps. We believe in building a community where everyone feels welcome, supported, and inspired to express themselves. As International Artists We have shared our passion in over 12 countries. We are also proud to serve as official judges for the Swiss Championship IDO and are active event organizers, dedicated to elevating the dance community. Our Philosophy Our teaching methodology is built on a strong foundation of technique, musicality, and connection. We don't just teach you what to do, but how to do it with style and fluidity. We draw inspiration from various dance styles to create a unique and modern approach to Bachata. CONNECTING THE COMMUNITY Curating World-Class Experiences Beyond the studio, we strive to create exceptional dance experiences. From curating Zurich's largest Dominican event to co-organizing one of Italy's most prestigious congresses, we bring the community together with passion. DOMINICAN BACHATA INTENSIVE BOOTCAMP Zurich's Premier Dominican Event We host the biggest Dominican event in Zurich , creating a home for authentic culture and music in the heart of Switzerland. INTERNATIONAL CONGRESS Milano Sensual Congress Co-organizers of one of Italy's top Bachata Sensual congresses. Top World Artists • 4.5 Star Luxury Hotel Frequently Asked Questions Do you teach in English? + Yes! All our classes are taught in English to welcome our international community in Zurich. We also speak German, Italian, Spanish, and Mandarin if you need extra clarification! Are the teachers certified? + Absolutely. Our instructors are trained in Bachata Sensual and continuously update their skills at international festivals and masterclasses. Plus, Ale & Xidan are certified IDO judges. What is "Bachata Sensual"? + Bachata Sensual is a style that evolved from traditional Bachata in Spain, created by Korke and Judith. It focuses more on connection and body movements than on footwork. Read more in our Bachata Style Guide . AXCENT DANCE Hermetschloostrasse 73, 8048 Zurich Altstetten 2 minute walking from Tram 2 stop and Bus 31 stop Quick Links What is Bachata Roots of Bachata Schedule Our Blog Legal Terms & Conditions Privacy Policy Imprint Find Us © 2025 AXcent Dance. # Page: Bachata Beginner 0 | AXcent Dance Zurich (bachata-beginner-0.html)
Description: Start your dance journey with Bachata Beginner 0. Designed specifically for your very first month. Learn the basic steps, rhythm, and connection in a fun, no-ego environment.

Bachata Beginner 0 | AXcent Dance Zurich AXCENT DANCE Home About us Schedule Registration Events Contact More ▾ Room Rental Corporate Events Wedding Dance Private Lessons Gallery Education Beginner Guide Blog FAQ Dance Etiquette Book Free Trial EN | DE LEVEL 0 Bachata Beginner 0: Your Very First Month The absolute starting point. Designed for people who have never danced before or are in their first month. No pressure, no ego, just pure fun and learning the basics. Day & Time Tuesdays 18:30 Location AXcent Dance Studio Level Beginner 0 What to Expect In the Beginner 0 course, we focus on the most essential fundamentals. We understand that starting can be intimidating, so we create a supportive environment where everyone is at the same starting line. You don't need a partner to join! Most of our students join solo. What You Will Learn Basic Steps & Time signature (The 1-2-3-4 rhythm) Basic Turns & Frame Simple Partner Connection Weight Transfer & Posture Confidence on the dance floor Prerequisites None! This is specifically for absolute beginners. 🫶 No Ego, Just Fun Mistakes are part of the fun! Check out our guide to start with the right mindset. Read Beginner Guide → Course Status CURRENTLY FULL This cycle is currently full. Contact us to be placed on the waiting list for the next intake. # Page: Bachata Beginner 1 | AXcent Dance Zurich (bachata-beginner-1.html)
Description: The perfect bridge to Sensual Bachata. Our Beginner 1 course in Zurich prepares you for complex body movement and connection. Book your trial class today.

Bachata Beginner 1 | AXcent Dance Zurich AXCENT DANCE Home About us Schedule Registration Events Contact More ▾ Room Rental Corporate Events Wedding Dance Private Lessons Gallery Education Beginner Guide Blog FAQ Dance Etiquette Book Free Trial EN | DE LEVEL 1 Bachata Beginner 1: Prepare for Sensual Style The essential bridge to Bachata Sensual. This course is for dancers with light experience who want to move beyond the basics, master fluid body movement, and build the connection required for the Sensual style. Day & Time Tuesdays 19:30 Location AXcent Dance Studio Level 3 - 6 months What to Expect This course is designed for dancers with 3 to 6 months of experience. If you want to improve your Bachata in Zurich and master the sensual style, this is the perfect level for you. You don't need a partner to join! We rotate partners during class, which is the best way to learn leading and following (and to make new friends while staying active!). What You Will Learn Essential Leading and Following for Sensual Developing your Bodyroll Fluid body movement & Culito Introduction to Sensual Bachata elements Dynamic connection & Flow Prerequisites Approx. 3-6 months of Bachata experience. If you are coming from a long day at work, please bring a change of shirt, deodorant, and mints. 🫶 No Ego, Just Fun We are here to support each other. Mistakes are part of the fun! Check out our guide to start with the right mindset. Read Beginner Guide → Ready to start? Join us for a trial class or sign up for the full course. # Page: Bachata Sensual Foundation Classes Zurich | AXcent Dance (bachata-sensual-foundation.html)
Description: Master the fundamentals of Bachata Sensual in Zurich. Learn body movement, isolation, and connection techniques.

Bachata Sensual Foundation Classes Zurich | AXcent Dance AXCENT DANCE Home About us Schedule Registration Events Contact More ▾ Room Rental Corporate Events Wedding Dance Private Lessons Gallery Education Beginner Guide Blog FAQ Dance Etiquette Book Free Trial EN | DE SENSUAL FOUNDATION Bachata Sensual Foundation Dive into the world of Bachata Sensual. This course focuses on the essential techniques of body movement, isolation, and smooth connection that define this style. Day & Time Wednesdays 19:30 Location AXcent Dance Studio Level 1 Year+ What to Expect Bachata Sensual is structured around 10 Fundamental Techniques . The objective of this course is to rotate through these 10 fundamentals, ensuring you build the absolute best foundation for social dancing. We introduce body waves, isolations, and circular movements with a strong emphasis on safety and technique. This course is essential for everyone, even for reviewing. These techniques are strictly required for higher levels and will not be explained in detail in later classes —only here. What You Will Learn Fundamental Techniques of Bachata Sensual Isolations Frame and Connections Foundational Partnerwork and Techniques Prerequisites 1 year of dancing, or completion of Bachata Beginner 0-1-2. Ready to level up? Join us for a trial class or sign up for the full course. # Page: How to Start Bachata in Zurich — A Complete Beginner Guide | AXcent Dance (beginner-guide.html)
Description: Never danced before? This beginner guide covers what to wear, shoes, etiquette, and everything for your first Bachata class in Zurich. No partner needed.

How to Start Bachata in Zurich — A Complete Beginner Guide | AXcent Dance AXCENT DANCE Home About us Schedule Registration Events Contact More ▾ Room Rental Corporate Events Wedding Dance Private Lessons Gallery Education Beginner Guide Blog FAQ Dance Etiquette Book Free Trial EN | DE Beginner Resources YOUR FIRST BACHATA CLASS Starting a new hobby can be exciting. Here is everything you need to know to feel confident, meet new people, and enjoy getting fit on the dance floor. What to Expect Dance Shoes Roles Etiquette What to Expect Walking into a dance studio for the first time can be intimidating, but finding a new passion shouldn't be. Dancing is a fantastic way to stay active and connect with people outside your usual circle. What to Wear Comfort is key! Wear clothes that allow you to move freely. Gym clothes, leggings, or casual wear like jeans are fine. Avoid anything too restrictive. Read Full Guide → Partner Rotation In our classes, we highly suggest rotating partners . It helps you learn faster and meet new people. If you prefer to stay with your own partner, we respect that choice. Shoe Guide Having the right tools makes a huge difference. Protect your knees and turn smoothly. Not Recommended Street Shoes Dirty soles damage the studio floor. Please always bring a separate pair of clean indoor shoes . Great Start Comfortable Sneakers Perfect for your first class! Any comfortable indoor sneaker works. Pro Choice Dance Sneakers There are brands specialized in sneaker dancing shoes. These are highly recommended for leaders and followers. Ask us for a promo code. Roles Bachata is a conversation between two people. Nowadays, anyone is welcome to choose either role. Leader Guides the dance and suggests moves. They are responsible for navigation and safety. Follower Interprets the signals and adds their own style. Etiquette & Hygiene Dancing is a close-contact activity. Please be mindful of your hygiene. Fresh breath (mints are great!), deodorant, and a fresh shirt go a long way. Please no chewing gum for safety and respect for teachers and other attendants. # Page: Bachata Education: History, Styles & Musicality | AXcent (education.html)
Description: The ultimate Bachata knowledge hub. Explore history, street styles, musicality instruments, and terminology with AXcent Dance Zurich.

Bachata Education: History, Styles & Musicality | AXcent AXCENT DANCE Home About us Schedule Registration Events Contact More ▾ Room Rental Corporate Events Wedding Dance Private Lessons Gallery Education Beginner Guide Blog FAQ Dance Etiquette Book Free Trial EN | DE KNOWLEDGE BASE Dance Education Understanding the history, music, and language of Bachata. History Styles Explained Musicality Glossary History of Bachata Bachata originated in the rural neighborhoods of the Dominican Republic in the early 1960s. Initially, it was known as "amargue" (bitterness) music, reflecting themes of heartbreak, loss, and longing. Deep Dive into the Roots Want to know why Bachata was prohibited and how it became a global sensation? READ THE FULL STORY → It wasn't until the 1990s, with artists like Juan Luis Guerra , that Bachata gained international recognition. In the early 2000s, the group Aventura revolutionized the genre by infusing it with R&B and Pop elements. Bachata Styles Explained As Bachata spread across the globe, it evolved into distinct styles. Understanding these differences helps you respect the roots while enjoying modern interpretations. Mastering each style is essential to becoming a complete dancer, as different songs and energies call for different ways of moving. Dominican (Traditional) The Roots. This is the original style danced in the DR. It focuses heavily on footwork (steps) rather than turns. Music: Faster tempo, guitar-dominated, raw acoustic sound. Movement: Focus on footwork (steps), playful syncopations, and hip movement. Connection: Typically open or close position, focusing on rhythmic partnership. Bachata Sensual The Evolution. Created in Cádiz, Spain, by Korke & Judith. It interprets the music through body isolations and waves. Music: Modern, melodic remixes or pop, with less heavy guitar. Movement: Flowy body isolations, waves, and circular movements. Connection: Close contact position, leading through frame and body points. Bachata Fusion The Fusion. A bridge between the two. It incorporates the turn patterns of Salsa and the basic steps of Traditional. Music: Urban fusion, incorporating R&B, Pop, and Hip-Hop elements. Movement: Turn patterns, cross-body leads, and intricate arm work. Connection: Dynamic interplay, frequently switching between open and closed holds. Musicality Guide Bachata music is driven by a specific set of instruments. Learning to listen to them allows you to predict the music and dance "in the pocket." Requinto (Lead Guitar) The melodic leader. It plays the intro, the solos, and sets the mood. Dancers often follow the Requinto with their footwork. Segunda (Rhythm Guitar) Adds syncopation and harmony. It supports the Requinto and fills the rhythmic space. Bass (Bajo) The heartbeat. It usually plays on beats 1, 3, and 4 (often holding the 4). It drives the energy and signals section changes. Bongo The rhythmic engine. The heavy hit on the 4th beat (the "Macho" drum) is what gives Bachata its drive. Güira The metal scraper. It keeps the timing and adds the high-frequency texture that makes the music danceable. Song Structure Bachata songs are typically divided into four main sections: Intro , Derecho (Verse - steady beat), Majao (Chorus - upbeat rhythm with bongo rolls), and Mambo (High energy, instrumental section). Good dancers anticipate these changes to adjust their energy and movement style accordingly. Dance Glossary Basic Step Three steps to the side followed by a tap (or hip movement) on the 4th beat. Tap Touching the floor with the toe without transferring weight. Marks the end of a 4-count phrase. Isolation Moving one part of the body (e.g., chest, hips) while keeping the rest still. Key for Sensual style. Frame The structure of the arms and upper body that allows the lead and follow to communicate connection. Prep A preparatory movement for a step or body movement. Social A party or event focused on social dancing rather than classes or performances. Musicality The ability to interpret the music through dance, matching movement to rhythm and melody. AXCENT DANCE Hermetschloostrasse 73, 8048 Zurich Altstetten 2 minute walking from Tram 2 stop and Bus 31 stop Quick Links What is Bachata Roots of Bachata Schedule Our Blog Legal Terms & Conditions Privacy Policy Imprint Find Us © 2025 AXcent Dance. All rights reserved.

# Page: Dance Etiquette | AXcent Dance Zurich (etiquette.html)
Description: Learn the essential rules of social dancing. A guide to dance floor etiquette, hygiene, and respect for the Bachata community.

Dance Etiquette | AXcent Dance Zurich AXCENT DANCE Home About us Schedule Registration Events Contact More ▾ Room Rental Corporate Events Wedding Dance Private Lessons Gallery Education Beginner Guide Blog FAQ Dance Etiquette Book Free Trial EN | DE COMMUNITY GUIDELINES Dance Floor Etiquette Respect, hygiene, and kindness make the dance floor a better place for everyone. The Golden Rules 🤝 Asking for a Dance Anyone can ask! Be polite, make eye contact, and extend your hand. Accept a "No" gracefully. 🚿 Hygiene Matters Fresh breath and deodorant are musts. Bring a spare shirt if needed. Your partner will thank you! 🙏 Saying Thank You Always thank your partner at the end of the dance. It shows appreciation for the shared moment. 🛑 Respect Boundaries If a partner prefers a open hold or more distance, respect it immediately without question. 🕊️ Be Gentle Lead and follow with care. Never force a move or grip too tightly. Safety comes first. On the Dance Floor 👀 Floorcraft Watch out for others. Avoid big moves on a crowded floor and protect your partner from collisions. 🎓 No Teaching Unless asked, don't teach on the social floor. Focus on connecting and having fun, not perfection. 😊 Smile & Connect Connection beats complexity. Relax, listen to the music, and enjoy the dance. A smile goes a long way! 🚫 No Aerials Lifts and aerials are for shows, not the social floor. Keep your feet on the ground for safety. 👣 Small Steps When the floor is packed, keep your steps small and under your body to save space. Class Rules 🍬 No Chewing Gum For safety reasons, please dispose of chewing gum before class starts. 🤫 Let the Teacher Teach Please don't correct other students. If you see an issue, focus on your own dancing. ⚡ Stay Active If you are tired, take a break outside the line. Sitting in class lowers the energy of the group. 🙋 Ask Questions Properly Don't step into the middle to ask. Please raise your hand and wait for the teacher. ⏰ Be Punctual Arrive on time to warm up properly and not miss important initial instructions. AXCENT DANCE Hermetschloostrasse 73, 8048 Zurich Altstetten 2 minute walking from Tram 2 stop and Bus 31 stop Quick Links What is Bachata Roots of Bachata Schedule Our Blog Legal Terms & Conditions Privacy Policy Imprint Find Us © 2025 AXcent Dance. All rights reserved.

# Page: FAQ - Frequently Asked Questions | AXcent Dance Zurich (faq.html)
Description: Find answers to common questions about our Bachata classes in Zurich. Partner requirements, clothing, pricing, and more.

FAQ - Frequently Asked Questions | AXcent Dance Zurich AXCENT DANCE Home About us Schedule Registration Events Contact More ▾ Room Rental Corporate Events Wedding Dance Private Lessons Gallery Education Beginner Guide Blog FAQ Dance Etiquette Book Free Trial EN | DE COMMON QUESTIONS FAQ Everything you need to know before your first class. Do I need a partner to join? No, you don't need a partner! We rotate partners frequently during class. This is the best way to learn how to lead and follow different people, and it's a great way to make new friends. Of course, if you come with a partner and prefer to stay together, that is also allowed. What should I wear? Wear comfortable clothing that allows you to move freely. For shoes, we recommend dance shoes or sneakers with a smooth sole that allows you to turn easily. Avoid heavy boots or shoes with too much grip. Read our full "What to Wear" guide here. I have never danced before. Can I join? Yes! Our Beginner 1 course is perfect for those with approx. 3-6 months of experience. If you are an absolute beginner, please check our upcoming schedule for new Beginner 0 start dates. How do I pay for classes? We accept payments via Twint, Cash, or Bank Transfer. You can pay for a single drop-in class, a 10-class pass, or sign up for a monthly subscription for the best value. Is there parking available? Yes, there are public parking spots available nearby (Blue Zone) and a parking garage at the Letzipark shopping center, which is a short walk away. We are also easily accessible by public transport (Tram 2, Bus 31). What if I miss a class? If you have a subscription or a class pass, please let us know in advance if you cannot make it. Depending on availability, you might be able to make up the class on another day of the same week, but please check with us first. Do you host Dominican Bachata events? Yes! We host intensive training events focusing on traditional style. Check out our upcoming Dominican Bachata Bootcamp in Zurich . # Page: What is Bachata Sensual? | AXcent Dance Zurich (guide-bachata-sensual.html)
Description: Learn about Bachata Sensual, a modern fusion style focusing on body movement and connection. The main style taught at AXcent Dance Zurich.

What is Bachata Sensual? | AXcent Dance Zurich AXCENT DANCE Home About us Schedule Registration Events Contact More ▾ Room Rental Corporate Events Wedding Dance Private Lessons Gallery Education Beginner Guide Blog FAQ Dance Etiquette Book Free Trial EN | DE OUR SPECIALTY What is Bachata Sensual? A modern evolution of the dance that has taken Europe by storm. It's about flow, feeling, and expressing the music with your whole body. Bachata Sensual was created in Spain by Korke & Judith. It respects the traditional basic steps of Bachata but adds more complex body movements, isolations, and circular figures. While traditional Bachata focuses more on footwork and playful partner interaction, Bachata Sensual focuses more on the connection between the partners and interpreting the melody and emotion of the song. Key Elements Body Waves: Smooth, flowing movements of the body. Isolations: Moving one part of the body (like the chest or hips) while keeping the rest still. Close Connection: A comfortable, respectful embrace that allows for subtle leading and following. Is it too intimate? The name "Sensual" can sometimes be misleading. It refers to "sensing" the music and the partner's movement, not necessarily sexual intimacy. At AXcent Dance, we place a huge emphasis on respect and boundaries . We teach you how to lead and follow these movements safely and comfortably, ensuring that both partners feel good. It's about creating a beautiful dance together, not about being inappropriate. Why learn with us? Our instructors are certified and trained in the official Bachata Sensual methodology. We focus on proper technique so you can execute these movements safely and look great doing it. Ready to feel the flow? BOOK A FREE TRIAL CLASS AXCENT DANCE Hermetschloostrasse 73, 8048 Zurich Altstetten 2 minute walking from Tram 2 stop and Bus 31 stop Quick Links What is Bachata Roots of Bachata Schedule Our Blog Legal Terms & Conditions Privacy Policy Imprint Find Us © 2025 AXcent Dance. All rights reserved.

---

# Page: What is Bachata? | The Ultimate Guide to Music & Dance Styles (guide-bachata.html)
Description: Learn all about Bachata music and dance. From Dominican roots to Sensual technique, history, and instruments. The complete guide for dancers in Zurich.

What is Bachata? | The Ultimate Guide to Music & Dance Styles AXCENT DANCE Home About us Schedule Registration Events Contact More ▾ Room Rental Corporate Events Wedding Dance Private Lessons Gallery Education Beginner Guide Blog FAQ Dance Etiquette Book Free Trial EN | DE THE BASICS The Complete Guide to Bachata From the streets of the Dominican Republic to dance floors around the world. Bachata is more than just a dance; it's a feeling. Bachata is a genre of music and dance that originated in the Dominican Republic in the mid-20th century. Initially considered music for the lower classes, it has exploded in popularity over the last few decades to become one of the most popular social dances in the world. The Rhythm Bachata music is characterized by a distinctive guitar sound (the requinto) and a 4/4 beat. The basic step is simple: three steps to the side, followed by a tap (or hip movement) on the fourth beat. 1, 2, 3, Tap! The 5 Pillars of Bachata Music Requinto (Lead Guitar) The star of the show. It plays the arpeggios, the solos, and the distinctive melodies that define the song's emotion. Segunda (Rhythm Guitar) The backbone. It provides the syncopated chords ('chop-chop') that lock in with the bongo to create the groove. Bass (Bajo) The heartbeat. It drives the song forward, typically marking beats 1, 3, and 4, giving depth to the rhythm section. Bongos The energy engine. The larger drum (Hembra) improvises, while the smaller drum (Macho) hits the sharp 4th beat accent. Güira The timekeeper. A metal scraper that fills the high frequencies and keeps the band tight and steady. Why Dance Bachata in Zurich? Zurich has one of the most vibrant Bachata communities in Europe. From social parties to workshops, the city is alive with Latin rhythm. At AXcent Dance in Zurich Altstetten , we are proud to be at the heart of this movement. We offer a structured curriculum that respects the Dominican roots while mastering the modern Sensual style. Whether you are looking for a new hobby, a way to meet people in Zurich, or serious dance training, our school provides the perfect environment. Why is it so popular? Bachata is incredibly accessible. The basic rhythm is easy to hear, and the basic steps are easy to learn. Unlike some other dances that require high energy or complex acrobatics, Bachata can be danced in a relaxed, smooth way. It's also very versatile. You can dance it to traditional Dominican songs, romantic ballads, or modern pop remixes. Different Styles Over time, Bachata has evolved into different styles: Dominican Bachata: The original style. Focuses on footwork, musicality, and playful partner interaction. Bachata Moderna: Incorporates elements from Salsa and other dances. More turns and figures. Bachata Sensual: The most popular style of bachata at the moment in Europe and America. Focuses on body movements and connection (this is our specialty!). Want to learn the steps? VIEW BACHATA CLASSES IN ZURICH AXCENT DANCE Hermetschloostrasse 73, 8048 Zurich Altstetten 2 minute walking from Tram 2 stop and Bus 31 stop Quick Links What is Bachata Roots of Bachata Schedule Our Blog Legal Terms & Conditions Privacy Policy Imprint Find Us © 2025 AXcent Dance. All rights reserved.

---

# Page: What is Social Dancing? | AXcent Dance Zurich (guide-social-dancing.html)
Description: Learn about social dancing, a fun and inclusive way to meet people and express yourself. Perfect for beginners in Zurich.

What is Social Dancing? | AXcent Dance Zurich AXCENT DANCE Home About us Schedule Registration Events Contact More ▾ Room Rental Corporate Events Wedding Dance Private Lessons Gallery Education Beginner Guide Blog FAQ Dance Etiquette Book Free Trial EN | DE NEWCOMER GUIDE What is Social Dancing? Forget everything you know about choreographed routines. Social dancing is about improvisation, connection, and having fun in the moment. What is Social Dancing? If you've ever watched "Dancing with the Stars" and thought, "I could never remember all those steps," we have good news for you: Social dancing is completely different. Social dancing is not about performing for an audience. It's about dancing with a partner for the sheer enjoyment of it. It happens at parties, clubs, and socials, where people of all ages and backgrounds come together to share a passion for music and movement. The Magic of Leading & Following In social dancing, there is no set choreography. Instead, we use a language of physical signals called "leading and following." One person (the leader) suggests a movement, and the other (the follower) interprets it. This creates a unique, improvised dance every single time. Do I need a partner? Absolutely not! This is the biggest myth about social dancing. In fact, most people come to classes alone. In our courses, we rotate partners frequently. This helps you learn faster because you get used to leading or following different people, not just one specific person. It's also a fantastic way to make new friends. The social dance community in Zurich is incredibly welcoming and diverse. Is it hard to learn? Like any new skill, it takes a little practice, but the basics are easier than you think. Our Beginner 1 courses are perfect if you have approx. 3-6 months of experience. We break everything down into simple steps to improve your flow. (Absolute beginners without any experience should check our starting dates for Beginner 0). Ready to give it a try? Join us for a trial class or sign up for the full course. REGISTER NOW AXCENT DANCE Hermetschloostrasse 73, 8048 Zurich Altstetten 2 minute walking from Tram 2 stop and Bus 31 stop Quick Links What is Bachata Roots of Bachata Schedule Our Blog Legal Terms & Conditions Privacy Policy Imprint Find Us © 2025 AXcent Dance. All rights reserved.

Imprint – AXcent Dance Zurich AXCENT DANCE Home About us Schedule Registration Events Contact More ▾ Room Rental Corporate Events Wedding Dance Private Lessons Gallery Education Beginner Guide Blog FAQ Dance Etiquette Book Free Trial EN | DE Imprint of AXcent Dance in Zurich This legal notice provides the official imprint of AXcent Dance in Zurich, including contact details, responsible parties, and important disclaimers regarding this website and its content. Overview Studio Location Email Contact Responsible for Content Copyright Notice Disclaimer – Third-Party Links Disclaimer – Liability The imprint identifies the owner and legal responsibility for this website in accordance with Swiss law. AXcent Dance is a Bachata and Sensual Bachata dance school operating in Zurich. This page clarifies who manages the website, how to reach us, and who is accountable for published content. Visitors can use this page to verify the authenticity of our school and the transparency of our communications. Studio Location Hermetschloostrasse 73 8048 Zürich Switzerland Email Contact Email: info@axcentdance.com Responsible for Content Alessandro Slamitz (Owner) Copyright Notice All texts, images, videos, and other materials on this website are the property of AXcent Dance or the specifically named rights holders. Any reproduction, distribution, or use of elements requires prior written consent from the respective rights holder. We respect the rights of all contributors and event participants. Disclaimer – Third-Party Links This website may contain links to external websites. AXcent Dance has no influence on the content of these third-party sites and assumes no liability for their content. Responsibility for linked pages lies solely with their operators. Disclaimer – Liability The author assumes no liability for the correctness, accuracy, timeliness, reliability, or completeness of the information provided. Liability claims against the author for material or immaterial damages resulting from access to, use of, or non-use of the published information, from misuse of the connection, or from technical malfunctions, are excluded. All offers are non-binding. The author expressly reserves the right to change, supplement, or delete parts of the pages or the entire offer without prior notice, or to temporarily or permanently cease publication. # Page: Bachata Lady Styling Classes Zurich | AXcent Dance (lady-styling.html)
Description: Express yourself with Bachata Lady Styling in Zurich. Improve your arm styling, body movement, and confidence.

Bachata Lady Styling Classes Zurich | AXcent Dance AXCENT DANCE Home About us Schedule Registration Events Contact More ▾ Room Rental Corporate Events Wedding Dance Private Lessons Gallery Education Beginner Guide Blog FAQ Dance Etiquette Book Free Trial EN | DE OPEN LEVEL Lady Styling Unleash your inner goddess. This course is dedicated to helping followers find their own style, improve their technique, and dance with elegance and power. Day & Time Thursdays 19:30 Location AXcent Dance Studio Level All Levels What to Expect Styling is a fundamental skill of body awareness and expression. Moving the body and arms for styling requires practice and a deep understanding of movement patterns. This course teaches your body the correct alignment and mechanics to style effortlessly in both solo moments and partnerwork. Arm styling is only the tip of the iceberg; it is your body that enables your arms to move, following the energy of the music. It is about self-expression and confidence . What You Will Learn Arm Styling Techniques Body Isolations & Waves Footwork & Shines Spinning Technique Confidence & Expression Prerequisites At least 8 months of dancing experience. Ready to shine? Join us for a trial class or sign up for the full course. # Page: Privacy Policy – AXcent Dance Zurich (privacy.html)
Description: Privacy Policy (Datenschutzerklärung) for AXcent Dance Zurich.

Privacy Policy – AXcent Dance Zurich AXCENT DANCE Home About us Schedule Registration Events Contact More ▾ Room Rental Corporate Events Wedding Dance Private Lessons Gallery Education Beginner Guide Blog FAQ Dance Etiquette Book Free Trial EN | DE Privacy Policy (Datenschutzerklärung) AXcent Dance Zurich Last updated: August 2025 Welcome to AXcent Dance. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect and use your personal data and what rights you have. It covers data collected through our website axcentdance.com and through in-studio registrations and communications in Zurich. Overview §1. Scope §2. Personal Data We Collect §3. Purpose of Data Processing §4. Legal Basis for Processing §5. Data Retention & Deletion §6. Cookies §7. Google Analytics §8. Google Ads §9. Third-Party Services §10. Your Rights §11. Contact Information §12. Changes to this Privacy Policy §1. Scope AXcent Dance processes personal data collected through https://axcentdance.com, class registrations, newsletters, and communications in Zurich. §2. Personal Data We Collect Depending on how you interact with us, we may collect the following data: Contact details: name, gender, email, and phone number when you contact us or book classes. Payment information: processed securely by our payment providers. We never store card data ourselves. Website usage data: IP address, browser type, and general activity data. §3. Purpose of Data Processing To manage class registrations, payments, attendance, and waitlists. To send information about courses, workshops, or events. To analyse traffic and improve website usability and security. §4. Legal Basis for Processing We process data under these legal bases: Consent: when you contact us, join newsletters, or accept non-essential cookies. Contract performance: when we handle your course registration and payment. Legitimate interests: when we improve our services or protect our systems. §5. Data Retention & Deletion We keep enrolment and payment records for ten years to comply with Swiss law. Our team applies technical and organisational safeguards to protect your data from loss, misuse, and unauthorised access. When data are no longer needed for the stated purposes, we delete or anonymise them. Marketing consents stay valid until you withdraw them. §6. Cookies Our website uses essential cookies to enable basic functions such as session management and navigation. We also use analytics and advertising cookies, but only after you give consent through the cookie banner or browser settings. You can change your cookie preferences at any time. §7. Google Analytics We use Google Analytics (Google LLC, USA) to understand how visitors use our site. The tool records anonymous statistics and uses IP anonymisation to protect your privacy. In rare cases, Google may transfer information to US servers under standard data protection safeguards. You can opt out of tracking in your browser or by installing Google’s opt-out plugin. §8. Google Ads AXcent Dance uses Google Ads (Google LLC, USA) to evaluate advertising performance and run remarketing campaigns. When you click one of our ads, Google may set a short-term conversion cookie that expires after 30 days. This cookie does not identify you personally but helps us measure campaign results. You can adjust or disable personalised advertising in your browser or Google account. §9. Third-Party Services We work with trusted partners who support our operations, such as payment processors, hosting providers, and analytics vendors. Some embedded content like YouTube or Google Maps may collect data under their own privacy policies. We share only the information necessary for each service and sign data processing agreements where required. §10. Your Rights You can request to access, correct, or delete your personal data. You may object to processing or request restrictions on how we use your information. Where applicable, you can ask us to transfer your data to another provider. You can withdraw your consent at any time by contacting us. §11. Contact Information AXcent Dance Zurich Email: info@axcentdance.com §12. Changes to this Privacy Policy AXcent Dance may update this Privacy Policy to reflect new legal requirements or business changes. We publish all updates on this page and include the new “Last updated” date. AXCENT DANCE Hermetschloostrasse 73, 8048 Zurich Altstetten 2 minute walking from Tram 2 stop and Bus 31 stop Quick Links What is Bachata Roots of Bachata Schedule Our Blog Legal Terms & Conditions Privacy Policy Imprint Find Us © 2025 AXcent Dance. All rights reserved.

# Page: Private Bachata Lessons Zurich — 1-on-1 Coaching | AXcent Dance (private-lessons.html)
Description: Book private Bachata lessons in Zurich for fast results. 1-on-1 coaching for technique, styling, and musicality. No partner needed. Contact AXcent Dance today.

Private Bachata Lessons Zurich — 1-on-1 Coaching | AXcent Dance AXCENT DANCE Home About us Schedule Registration Events Contact More ▾ Room Rental Corporate Events Wedding Dance Private Lessons Gallery Education Beginner Guide Blog FAQ Dance Etiquette Book Free Trial EN | DE PERSONAL COACHING PRIVATE BACHATA Fast-track your progress with 1-on-1 coaching tailored specifically to your unique goals and learning style. CONTACT US Why Go Private? Unlock your full potential with personalized attention. 🚀 Accelerated Learning One hour of private coaching can be worth weeks of group classes. We focus 100% on you, speeding up your muscle memory and understanding. 💎 Detail & Styling Refine your movement quality. We dive deep into micro-movements, musicality, and styling that transform you from a good dancer to a great one. 🎯 Custom Goals Whether you want to master the fundamentals, learn "that move you saw online", or refine your basic step and styling—we build the entire session around your personal goals. FAQs Do I need a dance partner? + No partner required! Our instructors will dance with you, allowing you to focus purely on your own technique and leading/following skills. Can we prepare a Wedding Dance? + Absolutely. We specialize in creating beautiful, memorable wedding choreographies that match your song and skill level. Visit our Wedding Dance page for more details. What should I wear? + Comfortable clothing that allows movement. For shoes, standard dance shoes or clean indoor sneakers are best. Avoid heavy boots or flip-flops. How much does it cost? + We will discuss the investment personally with you. Please fill out the contact form , and we will get back to you via WhatsApp or Email. Where do the lessons take place? + All private lessons are held at our home base: AXcent Dance Studio (Hermetschloostrasse 73, Zurich). What is your cancellation policy? + We understand plans change. Please cancel at least 24 hours in advance to avoid being charged the full lesson fee. Dance Studio Rental Zurich | Rent 138qm Mirror Hall AXCENT DANCE Home About us Schedule Registration Events Contact More ▾ Room Rental Corporate Events Wedding Dance Private Lessons Gallery Education Beginner Guide Blog FAQ Dance Etiquette Book Free Trial EN | DE SPACE FOR YOU ROOM RENTAL Create your own magic. Rent our beautiful studio room (~140m²) for your events, workshops, or rehearsals. The Studio Studio Specs 📐 140m² Total Space Approx. 110m² dance floor. High quality floor for all styles 🪞 9 Meters of Mirrors Full-height professional glass wall ⏫ 2.9m High Ceiling Ideal for lifts and aerial work 🔊 Pro Sound System Bluetooth & AUX ready connectivity 🛋️ Modern Lounge Entrance space for networking & chill ☀️ Natural Light 12 meters of wall-to-wall windows 💡 Lighting System Customizable colors & warm tones Rental Inquiry Please specify the purpose of your rental and whether it is a one-time or recurring booking. SEND INQUIRY Frequently Asked Questions Can I rent the room for private parties? + Yes, our studio is perfect for birthdays, workshops, and private events. Contact us for availability and customized rates for non-recurring events. What equipment is included? + The rental includes the high-quality sound system (Bluetooth/Aux), mirrors, and basic lighting. Additional equipment like chairs or tables can be arranged upon request. Is there parking available? + Yes, there is street parking available on the same street as the school. Public transport (Tram 2, Bus 31) is just 2 minutes walking distance. # Page: Terms and Conditions – AXcent Dance Zurich (terms.html)
Description: Terms and Conditions (AGB) for AXcent Dance Zurich.

Terms and Conditions – AXcent Dance Zurich AXCENT DANCE Home About us Schedule Registration Events Contact More ▾ Room Rental Corporate Events Wedding Dance Private Lessons Gallery Education Beginner Guide Blog FAQ Dance Etiquette Book Free Trial EN | DE LEGAL Terms & Conditions Please read our cancellation policy and rules carefully. Terms and Conditions (AGB) AXcent Dance Zurich Overview §1. Scope §2. Registration & Cancellation §3. Payment for Courses §4. Course Structure & Modifications §5. Absences During the Subscription Cycle §6. Course Cancellations by AXcent Dance §7. Trial Lesson §8. Dance Partners §9. Substitute Instructors §10. Liability §11. Data Protection & Media Use §12. Applicable Law & Jurisdiction §13. Severability §14. Code of Conduct in Class These Terms and Conditions (“Terms”) govern all services provided by AXcent Dance (“AXcent Dance,” “we,” “us”). They apply to all dance classes, workshops, and events (collectively, “Courses”) offered by AXcent Dance in Zurich. By registering for a Course, the participant confirms that they have read and agreed to these Terms, which form part of the contract between the participant and AXcent Dance. §1. Scope These Terms and Conditions apply to all Courses offered by AXcent Dance and to all participants unless otherwise agreed in writing. §2. Registration & Cancellation Registration for a Course is binding and obligates payment of the Course fee. Registrations are personal and non-transferable. Registration for intermediate-level Courses may require prior instructor approval. All memberships purchased are non-refundable. You may pause your membership in the following cases: Health reasons: In case of a long-term health issue (e.g., after surgery or an injury), you may request to pause your membership. Remaining lessons may be credited toward a later Course, subject to agreement. Email info@axcentdance.com. Travel/absence (3–8 consecutive weeks): You may request to freeze your membership and resume later. Contact info@axcentdance.com or speak with your instructor in advance. §3. Payment for Courses Course fees are due within 10 days of receiving the invoice. Payment can be made by purchasing the respective membership on axcentdance.com, by bank transfer to the AXcent Dance account, or via Twint. Failure to pay does not constitute cancellation. AXcent Dance may send payment reminders and charge a reminder fee of CHF 10 per reminder. §4. Course Structure & Modifications Partnerwork Courses and styling Courses run continuously throughout the year. AXcent Dance reserves the right to modify class design, schedules, and offerings as needed. Styling Courses: The first two lessons of each month focus on footwork, isolation, and foundational drills for both leaders and followers. The remaining lessons emphasize body movement, arm styling, and musical expression to help dancers develop personal style and stage confidence. §5. Absences During the Subscription Cycle If you cannot attend a lesson due to sickness, please notify AXcent Dance in advance (via email, WhatsApp, or group chat). This helps us plan partnerwork effectively and maintain balance in classes. A maximum of one missed lesson due to sickness per Course per 8 weeks may be made up, up to a total of two absences per term (declared + sickness). Additional missed lessons are forfeited. §6. Course Cancellations by AXcent Dance AXcent Dance may postpone or cancel classes due to insufficient registrations, public holidays, school holidays, or other exceptional circumstances. Affected participants will be informed in advance whenever possible. §7. Trial Lesson New participants can attend a trial lesson at any time during an ongoing course by registering in advance. The trial lesson is free of charge. §8. Dance Partners You may register without a dance partner. However, AXcent Dance may limit registrations in cases of a severe leader/follower imbalance. §9. Substitute Instructors If an instructor is absent due to illness, accident, or other reasons, AXcent Dance may assign a substitute instructor or reschedule. These changes do not entitle participants to refunds or make-up lessons. §10. Liability Participation in all Courses is at the participant’s own risk. AXcent Dance assumes no liability for accidents, injuries, theft, or property damage except in cases of gross negligence or intent. Participants are responsible for maintaining adequate accident and personal liability insurance. §11. Data Protection & Media Use Participant data are processed in accordance with Swiss data protection law. Data are not shared with third parties except when required by law. By registering, participants consent to the use of photos and videos taken during Courses or events for AXcent Dance’s advertising and informational purposes. §12. Applicable Law & Jurisdiction Swiss law applies exclusively. The place of jurisdiction for all disputes is Zurich, Switzerland. §13. Severability If any provision of these Terms is found invalid or unenforceable, the remaining provisions remain in effect. The invalid clause will be replaced by one that most closely reflects the original intent. §14. Code of Conduct in Class Participants must behave respectfully toward instructors and fellow students. AXcent Dance reserves the right to exclude disruptive individuals from Courses without refund. AXCENT DANCE Hermetschloostrasse 73, 8048 Zurich Altstetten 2 minute walking from Tram 2 stop and Bus 31 stop Quick Links What is Bachata Roots of Bachata Schedule Our Blog Legal Terms & Conditions Privacy Policy Imprint Find Us © 2025 AXcent Dance. All rights reserved.

# Page: Wedding Dance Zurich | Custom Choreography for Your First Dance (wedding-dance.html)
Description: Looking for Wedding Dance in Zurich? Get custom choreography for your first dance. Bachata, Salsa, or any style. Book your consultation today.

Wedding Dance Zurich | Custom Choreography for Your First Dance AXCENT DANCE Home About us Schedule Registration Events Contact More ▾ Room Rental Corporate Events Wedding Dance Private Lessons Gallery Education Beginner Guide Blog FAQ Dance Etiquette Book Free Trial EN | DE YOUR SPECIAL MOMENT YOUR FIRST DANCE, PERFECTED Choreography that tells your love story. From elegant waltzes to sensual Bachata, we create a dance that feels uniquely yours . BOOK CONSULTATION Why Choose AXcent? Your wedding dance shouldn't be stressful. It should be a moment of connection and joy. Whether you have "two left feet" or are experienced dancers, we guide you every step of the way. ♥ Tailored to You We choreograph to your chosen song and adapt the moves to your comfort level and dress. ♥ Any Style Dreaming of a romantic Bachata? A fiery Salsa? Or a classic slow dance? We do it all. ♥ Stress-Free Learning Private lessons in a relaxed atmosphere. We make sure you feel confident on the big day. The Process 01 Consultation We meet (online or in person) to discuss your vision, listen to your song, and understand your dance floor size and dress constraints. 02 Creation Our instructors create a custom choreography that highlights your strengths and fits the music perfectly. 03 Rehearsal Step-by-step private lessons in person at our studio. We film the steps so you can practice at home. We focus on connection and looking natural. # Page: Über uns | AXcent Dance Team & Philosophie Zürich (de/about.html)
Description: Triff die besten Tanzlehrer in Zürich bei AXcent Dance. Erfahre mehr über unsere Philosophie, unsere Instruktoren und unsere Leidenschaft.

Über uns | AXcent Dance Team & Philosophie Zürich AXCENT DANCE Home Über uns Stundenplan Anmeldung Events Kontakt Mehr ▾ Raumvermietung Firmenevents Hochzeitstanz Privatstunden Galerie Ausbildung Anfänger Guide Blog FAQ Tanzetikette Probelektion EN | DE AXcent Team Das Team hinter AXcent Dance Zürich Leidenschaft, Technik und Gemeinschaft. Unsere Mission Es ist uns eine Ehre, eingeladen zu werden, um unsere Leidenschaft mit Tanz-Communities auf der ganzen Welt zu teilen. 25+ Städte 12 Länder 400+ Erreichte Tänzer ∞ Erinnerungen DIE GRÜNDER Ale y Xidan Wir sind Alessandro und Xidan, die Gründer von AXcent Dance. Unsere Reise begann mit einer gemeinsamen Leidenschaft für Bachata Sensual und der Vision einer Tanzschule, die mehr ist als nur Schritte zu lehren. Wir glauben an den Aufbau einer Gemeinschaft, in der sich jeder willkommen, unterstützt und inspiriert fühlt. Als internationale Künstler Wir haben unsere Leidenschaft in über 12 Ländern geteilt. Wir sind stolz darauf, als offizielle Wertungsrichter für die Schweizer Meisterschaft IDO zu dienen und sind aktive Event-Organisatoren, die sich der Förderung der Tanzszene widmen. Unsere Philosophie Unsere Lehrmethodik basiert auf einem starken Fundament aus Technik, Musikalität und Verbindung. Wir bringen dir nicht nur bei was du tun sollst, sondern wie du es mit Stil und Fluss tust. Wir lassen uns von verschiedenen Tanzstilen inspirieren, um einen einzigartigen und modernen Ansatz für Bachata zu schaffen. DIE COMMUNITY VERBINDEN Weltklasse-Erlebnisse schaffen Über das Studio hinaus streben wir danach, außergewöhnliche Tanzerlebnisse zu schaffen. Von Zürichs größtem Dominican-Event bis zur Mitorganisation eines der prestigeträchtigsten Kongresse Italiens – wir bringen die Community mit Leidenschaft zusammen. DOMINICAN BACHATA INTENSIVE BOOTCAMP Zürichs grösstes Dominican Event Wir veranstalten das größte Dominican Event in Zürich und schaffen ein Zuhause für authentische Kultur und Musik im Herzen der Schweiz. INTERNATIONALER KONGRESS Milano Sensual Congress Mitorganisatoren eines der besten Bachata Sensual Kongresse Italiens. Top-Weltkünstler • 4.5 Sterne Luxus-Hotel Häufig gestellte Fragen Unterrichtet ihr auf Englisch? + Ja! Alle unsere Kurse werden auf Englisch unterrichtet, um unsere internationale Community in Zürich willkommen zu heißen. Wir sprechen auch Deutsch, Italienisch, Spanisch und Chinesisch, falls du Hilfe brauchst! Sind die Lehrer zertifiziert? + Absolut. Unsere Instruktoren sind in Bachata Sensual ausgebildet und bilden sich ständig auf internationalen Festivals und Masterclasses weiter. Zudem sind Ale & Xidan zertifizierte IDO-Wertungsrichter. Was ist "Bachata Sensual"? + Bachata Sensual ist ein Stil, der sich in Spanien aus dem traditionellen Bachata entwickelt hat und von Korke und Judith kreiert wurde. Der Fokus liegt mehr auf Verbindung und Körperbewegungen als auf Footwork. Lies mehr in unserem Bachata Stil-Guide . AXCENT DANCE Hermetschloostrasse 73, 8048 Zurich Altstetten 2 Minuten zu Fuss von Tram 2 und Bus 31 Haltestelle Schnellzugriff Was ist Bachata Wurzeln des Bachatas Stundenplan Unser Blog Rechtliches AGB Datenschutz Impressum Finde uns © 2025 AXcent Dance. Alle Rechte vorbehalten.

# Page: Bachata Beginner 0 | AXcent Dance Zürich (de/bachata-beginner-0.html)
Description: Beginne deine Tanzreise mit Bachata Beginner 0. Speziell für deinen allerersten Monat konzipiert. Lerne die Grundschritte, den Rhythmus und die Verbindung in einer entspannten Atmosphäre.

Bachata Beginner 0 | AXcent Dance Zürich AXCENT DANCE Home Über uns Stundenplan Anmeldung Events Kontakt Mehr ▾ Raumvermietung Firmenevents Hochzeitstanz Privatstunden Galerie Ausbildung Anfänger Guide Blog FAQ Tanzetikette Probelektion EN | DE LEVEL 0 Bachata Beginner 0: Dein allererster Tanzmonat Der absolute Startpunkt. Konzipiert für Menschen, die noch nie getanzt haben oder in ihrem ersten Monat sind. Kein Druck, kein Ego, einfach purer Spass und das Erlernen der Basics. Tag & Zeit Dienstags 18:30 Standort AXcent Dance Studio Niveau Beginner 0 Was dich erwartet Im Beginner 0 Kurs konzentrieren wir uns auf die wichtigsten Grundlagen. Wir wissen, dass der Anfang einschüchternd sein kann. Deshalb schaffen wir eine unterstützende Atmosphäre , in der alle an der gleichen Startlinie stehen. Du brauchst keinen Partner , um teilzunehmen! Die meisten unserer Schüler kommen solo. Was du lernen wirst Grundschritte & Taktgefühl (Der 1-2-3-4 Rhythmus) Einfache Drehungen & Frame Einfache Verbindung zum Partner Gewichtsverlagerung & Haltung Selbstvertrauen auf der Tanzfläche Voraussetzungen Keine! Dies ist speziell für absolute Anfänger. 🫶 Kein Ego, nur Spass Fehler gehören dazu! Lies unseren Guide, um mit der richtigen Einstellung zu starten. Anfänger Guide lesen → Kursstatus AKTUELL VOLL Dieser Zyklus ist momentan ausgebucht. Kontaktiere uns, um auf die Warteliste für den nächsten Kurs zu kommen. # Page: Bachata Beginner 1 | AXcent Dance Zürich (de/bachata-beginner-1.html)
Description: Die perfekte Brücke zum Sensual Bachata. Unser Beginner 1 Kurs in Zürich bereitet dich auf komplexe Körperbewegungen und Verbindung vor. Buche jetzt deine Probelektion.

Bachata Beginner 1 | AXcent Dance Zürich AXCENT DANCE Home Über uns Stundenplan Anmeldung Events Kontakt Mehr ▾ Raumvermietung Firmenevents Hochzeitstanz Privatstunden Galerie Ausbildung Anfänger Guide Blog FAQ Tanzetikette Probelektion EN | DE LEVEL 1 Bachata Beginner 1: Vorbereitung auf Sensual Style Die essenzielle Brücke zu Bachata Sensual. Dieser Kurs ist für Tänzer mit ersten Kenntnissen gedacht, die über die Grundlagen hinausgehen, fliessende Körperbewegungen meistern und die für den Sensual-Stil erforderliche Verbindung aufbauen möchten. Tag & Zeit Dienstags 19:30 Standort AXcent Dance Studio Niveau 3 - 6 Monate Was dich erwartet Dieser Kurs ist für Tänzer mit 3 bis 6 Monaten Erfahrung konzipiert. Wenn du in Zürich dein Bachata verbessern möchtest und den Sensual Stil meistern willst, bist du hier richtig. Du brauchst keinen Partner , um teilzunehmen! Wir rotieren die Partner innerhalb der Stunde, was der beste Weg ist, um Führen und Folgen zu lernen (und neue Freunde zu finden während du aktiv bleibst!). Was du lernen wirst Essenzielles Führen und Folgen für Sensual Entwicklung deines Bodyrolls Fliessende Körperbewegung & Culito Einführung in Bachata Sensual Elemente Dynamische Verbindung & Flow Voraussetzungen Ca. 3-6 Monate Bachata-Erfahrung. Wenn du von einem langen Arbeitstag kommst, bringe bitte ein Wechselshirt, Deo und Pfefferminz mit. 🫶 Kein Ego, nur Spass Wir sind hier, um uns gegenseitig zu unterstützen. Fehler sind Teil des Spasses! Lies unseren Guide, um mit der richtigen Einstellung zu starten. Anfänger Guide lesen → Bereit zu starten? Besuche uns für eine Probelektion oder melde dich für den kompletten Kurs an. # Page: Bachata Sensual Foundation Kurse Zürich | AXcent Dance (de/bachata-sensual-foundation.html)
Description: Meistere die Grundlagen von Bachata Sensual in Zürich. Lerne Körperbewegung, Isolation und Verbindungstechniken.

Bachata Sensual Foundation Kurse Zürich | AXcent Dance AXCENT DANCE Home Über uns Stundenplan Anmeldung Events Kontakt Mehr ▾ Raumvermietung Firmenevents Hochzeitstanz Privatstunden Galerie Ausbildung Anfänger Guide Blog FAQ Tanzetikette Probelektion EN | DE SENSUAL FOUNDATION Bachata Sensual Foundation Tauche ein in die Welt des Bachata Sensual. Dieser Kurs konzentriert sich auf die wesentlichen Techniken der Körperbewegung, Isolation und flüssigen Verbindung, die diesen Stil definieren. Tag & Zeit Mittwochs 19:30 Standort AXcent Dance Studio Niveau 1 Jahr+ Was dich erwartet Bachata Sensual ist strukturiert um 10 Fundamentale Techniken . Das Ziel dieses Kurses ist es, diese 10 Grundlagen zu rotieren, um sicherzustellen, dass du das absolut beste Fundament für Social Dancing aufbaust. Wir führen Bodywaves, Isolationen und kreisförmige Bewegungen mit starkem Fokus auf Sicherheit und Technik ein. Dieser Kurs ist für jeden essentiell, auch zur Wiederholung. Diese Techniken sind streng erforderlich für höhere Level und werden in späteren Klassen nicht mehr detailliert erklärt – nur hier. Was du lernen wirst Fundamentale Techniken des Bachata Sensual Isolationen Frame und Verbindungen Fundamentale Partnerwork und Techniken Voraussetzungen 1 Jahr Tanzerfahrung oder Abschluss von Bachata Anfänger 0-1-2. Bereit für das nächste Level? Besuche uns für eine Probelektion oder melde dich für den kompletten Kurs an. PROBELEKTION BUCHEN JETZT ANMELDEN AXCENT DANCE Hermetschloostrasse 73, 8048 Zurich Altstetten 2 Minuten zu Fuss von Tram 2 und Bus 31 Haltestelle Schnellzugriff Was ist Bachata Wurzeln des Bachatas Stundenplan Unser Blog Rechtliches AGB Datenschutz Impressum Finde uns © 2025 AXcent Dance. # Page: Bachata Sensual Improver | AXcent Dance Zürich (de/bachata-sensual-improver.html)
Description: Verfeinere deine Bachata Sensual Fähigkeiten in Zürich. Fokus auf komplexe Bewegungen, Musikalität und geschmeidiges Führen/Folgen.

Bachata Sensual Improver | AXcent Dance Zürich AXCENT DANCE Home Über uns Stundenplan Anmeldung Events Kontakt Mehr ▾ Raumvermietung Firmenevents Hochzeitstanz Privatstunden Galerie Ausbildung Anfänger Guide Blog FAQ Tanzetikette Probelektion EN | DE IMPROVER Bachata Sensual Improver Bringe dein Tanzen auf das nächste Level. Dieser Kurs ist für Tänzer, die die Grundlagen kennen und ihre Technik verfeinern, ihr Repertoire erweitern und mit mehr Selbstvertrauen tanzen möchten. Tag & Zeit Mittwochs 20:30 Standort AXcent Dance Studio Niveau 1 - 2 Jahre Was dich erwartet Im Improver-Level bewegen wir uns über die Grundlagen hinaus und beginnen, komplexere Kombinationen und musikalische Interpretation zu erforschen. Wir konzentrieren uns stark auf die Qualität der Bewegung und Verbindung. Wir bauen auf den 10 fundamentalen Techniken auf, mit Variationen und Übergängen. Du lernst, wie du verschiedene Elemente flüssig kombinierst und wie du dein Tanzen an verschiedene Songs und Partner anpasst. Was du lernen wirst Variationen der 10 fundamentalen Techniken Sensual Basic Übergänge zwischen den fundamentalen Techniken Fortgeschrittenere Körperbewegungen Musikalität & Breaks Dynamik von Führen/Folgen Voraussetzungen Dieser Kurs kann parallel zum Foundation-Kurs besucht werden, nachdem 2 Zyklen (4 Monate) Foundation absolviert wurden. Mindestens 1 Jahr Tanzerfahrung erforderlich. Du solltest mit den Figuren aus Bachata 0 und 1 vertraut sein, sowie mit den fundamentalen Körperbewegungen (Welle und Contra). Bereit dich zu verbessern? Besuche uns für eine Probelektion oder melde dich für den kompletten Kurs an. PROBELEKTION BUCHEN JETZT ANMELDEN AXCENT DANCE Hermetschloostrasse 73, 8048 Zurich Altstetten 2 Minuten zu Fuss von Tram 2 und Bus 31 Haltestelle Schnellzugriff Was ist Bachata Wurzeln des Bachatas Stundenplan Unser Blog Rechtliches AGB Datenschutz Impressum Finde uns © 2025 AXcent Dance. # Page: Bachata Sensual Mittelstufe/Fortgeschritten | AXcent Dance Zürich (de/bachata-sensual-inter-adv.html)
Description: Fordere dich heraus mit Bachata Sensual Mittelstufe/Fortgeschritten in Zürich. Komplexe Figuren, Musikalität und fortgeschrittene Technik.

Bachata Sensual Mittelstufe/Fortgeschritten | AXcent Dance Zürich AXCENT DANCE Home Über uns Stundenplan Anmeldung Events Kontakt Mehr ▾ Raumvermietung Firmenevents Hochzeitstanz Privatstunden Galerie Ausbildung Anfänger Guide Blog FAQ Tanzetikette Probelektion EN | DE MITTELSTUFE / FORTGESCH. Bachata Sensual Inter/Adv Für erfahrene Tänzer, die an ihre Grenzen gehen wollen. Wir erforschen komplizierte Muster, fortgeschrittene Musikalitätskonzepte und Technik auf hohem Niveau. Tag & Zeit Donnerstags 20:30 Standort AXcent Dance Studio Niveau 2+ Jahre Was dich erwartet Dieser Kurs ist als Ergänzung zum Improver-Kurs gedacht und geht über die Grundlagen hinaus. Während der Improver-Kurs die 10 fundamentalen Techniken festigt, erforschen wir hier Figuren, die die Regeln brechen, und integrieren Bewegungen aus verschiedenen Stilen. Wir legen grossen Wert auf fortgeschrittene Technik und setzen die Beherrschung der 10 Grundlagen des Bachata Sensual voraus. Erwarte ein schnelleres Tempo, da wir uns nicht damit aufhalten, Konzepte aus dem Foundation- oder Improver-Lehrplan zu wiederholen. Was du lernen wirst Fortgeschrittene Körperbewegungen (Variationen) Musikalität & Interpretation Technik-Rueda Improvisations-Werkzeuge Timing & Dynamik Voraussetzungen Besuch des Improver-Levels und mindestens 2 Jahre regelmässige Tanzerfahrung. Du musst die 10 fundamentalen Techniken des Bachata Sensual fliessend beherrschen, da wir diese Grundlagen in diesem Kurs nicht erneut erklären. Bereit für die Herausforderung? Besuche uns für eine Probelektion oder melde dich für den kompletten Kurs an. # Page: Bachata Anfänger Guide Zürich — Deine erste Tanzstunde | AXcent Dance (de/beginner-guide.html)
Description: Noch nie getanzt? Unser Anfänger Guide erklärt alles für deine erste Bachata Stunde in Zürich: Kleidung, Schuhe, Etikette. Kein Partner nötig.

Bachata Anfänger Guide Zürich — Deine erste Tanzstunde | AXcent Dance AXCENT DANCE Home Über uns Stundenplan Anmeldung Events Kontakt Mehr ▾ Raumvermietung Firmenevents Hochzeitstanz Privatstunden Galerie Ausbildung Anfänger Guide Blog FAQ Tanzetikette Probelektion EN | DE Anfänger Ressourcen DEINE ERSTE BACHATA STUNDE Ein neues Hobby zu starten ist aufregend. Hier ist alles, was du wissen musst, um dich wohlzufühlen, neue Leute zu treffen und fit zu werden. Was dich erwartet Tanzschuhe Rollen Etikette Was dich erwartet Das erste Mal in ein Tanzstudio zu gehen kann einschüchternd sein, aber eine neue Leidenschaft zu finden sollte einfach sein. Tanzen ist der beste Weg, um aktiv zu bleiben und Leute ausserhalb deines gewohnten Kreises zu treffen. Kleidung Komfort ist wichtig! Trage Kleidung, in der du dich frei bewegen kannst. Sportkleidung, Leggings oder Freizeitkleidung wie Jeans sind in Ordnung. Vermeide alles zu Enge. Ganzen Guide lesen → Hygiene ist der Schlüssel Wir tanzen mit einer anderen Person. Bitte benutze Deo, bring ein Minzbonbon mit und vielleicht ein zweites Shirt. Sei freundlich Lächle! Wir sind hier, um Spaß zu haben. Wenn Fehler passieren (und das werden sie), lach einfach darüber und mach weiter. Schuh-Guide Das richtige Werkzeug macht einen großen Unterschied. Schütze deine Knie und drehe dich geschmeidig. Nicht Empfohlen Strassenschuhe Schmutzige Sohlen beschädigen den Studioboden. Bitte bring immer ein separates Paar saubere Hallenschuhe mit. Guter Start Bequeme Sneakers Perfekt für deine erste Stunde! Jeder bequeme Hallenschuh funktioniert. Profi Wahl Tanz-Sneakers Es gibt Marken, die auf Tanz-Sneaker spezialisiert sind. Diese sind für Leader und Follower sehr zu empfehlen. Frag uns nach einem Promo-Code. Rollen Bachata ist eine Unterhaltung zwischen zwei Personen. Heutzutage kann jeder jede Rolle wählen. Leader Führt den Tanz und schlägt Figuren vor. Er ist verantwortlich für Navigation und Sicherheit. Follower Interpretiert die Signale und fügt den eigenen Stil hinzu. Etikette & Hygiene Tanzen ist eine Aktivität mit engem Kontakt. Bitte achte auf deine Hygiene. Frischer Atem (Minzbonbons sind super!), Deo und ein frisches Shirt bewirken viel. Bitte kein Kaugummi aus Sicherheitsgründen und aus Respekt gegenüber den Lehrern und anderen Teilnehmern. AXCENT DANCE Hermetschloostrasse 73, 8048 Zurich Altstetten 2 Minuten zu Fuss von Tram 2 und Bus 31 Haltestelle Schnellzugriff Was ist Bachata Wurzeln des Bachatas Stundenplan Unser Blog Rechtliches AGB Datenschutz Impressum Finde uns © 2025 AXcent Dance. Alle Rechte vorbehalten.

# Page: Dominican Bachata | Intensiv Camp | AXcent Dance Zürich (de/dominican-bootcamp.html)
Description: Lerne authentischen Dominican Bachata in Zürich. Erlebe 7 Stunden intensives Bootcamp mit Aitor & Sarah für Fußarbeit, Technik und Musikalität.

Dominican Bachata | Intensiv Camp | AXcent Dance Zürich AXCENT DANCE Home Über uns Stundenplan Anmeldung Events Kontakt Mehr ▾ Raumvermietung Firmenevents Hochzeitstanz Privatstunden Galerie Ausbildung Anfänger Guide Blog FAQ Tanzetikette Probelektion EN | DE Dominican Bachata Bootcamp in Zürich Das ultimative Trainingserlebnis für Dominican Bachata in Zürich. Tauche in unserem Intensiv-Bootcamp tief in authentische Technik, Rhythmus und Footwork ein – mit Weltklasse-Lehrern. 2. Ausgabe • 3./4. Oktober 2026 Intensives Training Wir glauben an tiefgreifendes Lernen. Zu oft zahlt man auf Kongressen einen Premium-Preis, bekommt aber nur einen kurzen Blick auf die Top-Künstler. Unsere Events sind anders. Wir konzentrieren uns auf intensive Workshops mit internationalen Gästen und garantieren dir eine signifikante Anzahl an Stunden, um ihre Technik und ihren Stil wirklich zu verinnerlichen. Meistere authentischen Dominican Bachata in Zürich . Trainiere intensiv mit den internationalen Künstlern Aitor Gomez & Sarah La Morena direkt hier in der Schweiz. 7 STUNDEN Intensives Training Lehrer Aitor & Sarah Format 4 Stunden mit Aitor + 3 Stunden mit Sarah Datum 3./4. Okt 2026 Preis 115 CHF Jetzt Anmelden Vorname Nachname E-Mail Adresse WhatsApp Nummer Ich stimme den AGB zu Ich habe die Datenschutzerklärung gelesen ZUR ZAHLUNG * Weiterleitung zur sicheren Stripe-Zahlung Häufig gestellte Fragen Ist es nur Dominican Bachata? + Ja! Dieses Event konzentriert sich ausschliesslich auf authentische Dominican Bachata Technik, Musikalität und Footwork. Ist das Bootcamp für alle Niveaus geeignet? + Nein, dieses Bootcamp richtet sich an Tänzer mit mindestens 1 Jahr Bachata-Erfahrung . Es ist nicht für absolute Anfänger geeignet. Kann ich mein Ticket weiterverkaufen? + Ja, du kannst dein Ticket auf eine andere Person übertragen. Bitte schreibe uns eine E-Mail mit dem Namen des neuen Teilnehmers. # Page: Bachata Ausbildung: Geschichte, Stile & Musikalität | AXcent (de/education.html)
Description: Die ultimative Bachata-Wissensdatenbank in Zürich. Entdecke Geschichte, Tanzstile, Musikalität und Fachbegriffe mit AXcent Dance Altstetten.

Bachata Ausbildung: Geschichte, Stile & Musikalität | AXcent AXCENT DANCE Home Über uns Stundenplan Anmeldung Events Kontakt Mehr ▾ Raumvermietung Firmenevents Hochzeitstanz Privatstunden Galerie Ausbildung Anfänger Guide Blog FAQ Tanzetikette Probelektion EN | DE WISSENSBASIS Tanz-Ausbildung Verstehe die Geschichte, Musik und Sprache des Bachata. Geschichte Stile Erklärt Musikalität Glossar Geschichte des Bachata Bachata entstand in den ländlichen Vierteln der Dominikanischen Republik in den frühen 1960er Jahren. Ursprünglich war es als "Amargue" (Bitterkeit) Musik bekannt. Tauche ein in die Geschichte Willst du wissen, warum Bachata früher verboten war und wie er zum globalen Phänomen wurde? URSPRÜNGE ENTDECKEN → Erst in den 1990er Jahren erlangte Bachata durch Künstler wie Juan Luis Guerra internationale Anerkennung. In den frühen 2000er Jahren revolutionierte die Gruppe Aventura das Genre. Bachata Stile Erklärt Als sich Bachata weltweit verbreitete, entwickelte er sich zu verschiedenen Stilen. Das Verständnis dieser Unterschiede hilft dir, die Wurzeln zu respektieren und gleichzeitig moderne Interpretationen zu genießen. Das Beherrschen jedes Stils ist entscheidend, um ein kompletter Tänzer zu werden, da verschiedene Songs und Energien unterschiedliche Bewegungsarten erfordern. Dominican (Traditionell) Die Wurzeln. Dies ist der ursprüngliche Stil, der in der Dominikanischen Republik getanzt wird. Er konzentriert sich stark auf Footwork (Schritte) statt auf Drehungen. Musik: Schnelleres Tempo, gitarrenlastig, roher akustischer Sound. Bewegung: Fokus auf Footwork (Schritte), verspielte Synkopen und Hüftbewegung. Verbindung: Typischerweise offene oder geschlossene Haltung, Fokus auf rhythmische Partnerschaft. Bachata Sensual Die Evolution. Erstellt in Cádiz, Spanien, von Korke & Judith. Er interpretiert die Musik durch Körperisolationen und Wellen. Musik: Moderne, melodische Remixes oder Pop, mit weniger schwerer Gitarre. Bewegung: Fließende Körperisolationen, Wellen und kreisförmige Bewegungen. Verbindung: Enge Kontaktposition, Führung durch Rahmen und Körperpunkte. Bachata Fusion Die Fusion. Eine Brücke zwischen den beiden. Er integriert die Drehmuster des Salsa und die Grundschritte des Traditionellen. Musik: Urban Fusion, integriert R&B, Pop und Hip-Hop Elemente. Bewegung: Drehmuster, Cross-Body Leads und komplexe Armarbeit. Verbindung: Dynamisches Zusammenspiel, häufiger Wechsel zwischen offener und geschlossener Haltung. Musikalitäts-Guide Bachata Musik wird von einem spezifischen Satz von Instrumenten angetrieben. Zu lernen, auf sie zu hören, erlaubt dir, die Musik vorherzusagen und "im Takt" zu tanzen. Requinto (Lead Gitarre) Der melodische Anführer. Sie spielt das Intro, die Solos und setzt die Stimmung. Tänzer folgen oft dem Requinto mit ihrem Footwork. Segunda (Rhythmus Gitarre) Fügt Synkopen und Harmonie hinzu. Sie unterstützt das Requinto und füllt den rhythmischen Raum. Bass (Bajo) Der Herzschlag. Er spielt normalerweise auf den Schlägen 1, 3 und 4 (oft hält er die 4). Er treibt die Energie an und signalisiert Sektionswechsel. Bongo Der rhythmische Motor. Der schwere Schlag auf dem 4. Takt (der "Macho"-Trommel) gibt dem Bachata seinen Antrieb. Güira Der Metallschaber. Er hält das Timing und fügt die hochfrequente Textur hinzu, die die Musik tanzbar macht. Song-Struktur Bachata Songs sind typischerweise in vier Hauptsektionen unterteilt: Intro , Derecho (Vers - stetiger Beat), Majao (Chorus - peppiger Rhythmus mit Bongo Rolls) und Mambo (Hochenergie, instrumentaler Teil). Gute Tänzer antizipieren diese Wechsel, um ihre Energie und ihren Bewegungsstil entsprechend anzupassen. Tanz-Glossar Grundschritt (Basic Step) Drei Schritte zur Seite gefolgt von einem Tap (oder Hüftbewegung) auf dem 4. Takt. Tap Berühren des Bodens mit der Zehe ohne Gewichtsverlagerung. Markiert das Ende einer 4-Takt-Phrase. Isolation Bewegen eines Körperteils (z.B. Brustkorb, Hüfte) während der Rest still bleibt. Schlüssel für Sensual Stil. Rahmen (Frame) Die Struktur der Arme und des Oberkörpers, die es Lead und Follow ermöglicht, Verbindung zu kommunizieren. Prep Eine vorbereitende Bewegung für einen Schritt oder eine Körperbewegung. Social Eine Party oder ein Event, das sich auf soziales Tanzen konzentriert, statt auf Kurse oder Aufführungen. Musikalität Die Fähigkeit, die Musik durch Tanz zu interpretieren und Bewegung an Rhythmus und Melodie anzupassen. AXCENT DANCE Hermetschloostrasse 73, 8048 Zurich Altstetten 2 Minuten zu Fuss von Tram 2 und Bus 31 Haltestelle Schnellzugriff Was ist Bachata Wurzeln des Bachatas Stundenplan Unser Blog Rechtliches AGB Datenschutz Impressum Finde uns © 2025 AXcent Dance. Alle Rechte vorbehalten.
